blended.narrative: Snoqualmie Pass is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 21 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,099 ft. Looking ahead, 35 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 10.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 5" over the past week. Current depth: 24".
